name: LineInteractor
summary: Implementation of the interactor for line input

constructors.name: LineInteractor
constructors.signature: LineInteractor( interactor_result: LineInteractorResult, is_first_input: bool, prompt: str, allow_pick_up: bool = False, uvs_to_world: bool = False, preview_function: Callable[[Line3D], list] | LineInteractor() | LineInteractor()

params.name: is_first_input
params.doc: is this the first input in an input sequence

params.name: prompt
params.doc: prompt message shown in the dialog line

params.name: allow_pick_up
params.doc: allow to pick up a line from an existing element

params.name: uvs_to_world
params.doc: when True and line is input in an UVS, the resulting line will be transformed to from UVS to world coordinate system

params.name: preview_function
params.doc: function for generating preview elements during the input

params.name: default_input_value
params.doc: default input value. If set to None, no input value field is provided.

params.name: abscissa_element
params.doc: abscissa element for the point projection

methods.name: draw_preview
methods.summary: Draw the preview during the input. If a function generating preview elements from a 3D line is defined, use it. Otherwise preview a red 3D line.
methods.remarks: Draw the preview during the input. If a function generating preview elements from a 3D line is defined, use it. Otherwise preview a red 3D line.

methods.name: get_input_line
methods.signature: get_input_line() -> Line3D | get_input_line(mouse_msg: int, pnt: Point2D, msg_info: AddMsgInfo) -> Line3D
methods.summary: Construct the input line from the mouse message. This overload is meant to be used inside events, where no mouse message is available ().
methods.remarks: Construct the input line from the mouse message. This overload is meant to be used inside events, where no mouse message is available ().

methods.name: on_cancel_function
methods.summary: Handles the event of hitting ESC during the input Cancels the input, when ESC is hit during the start point input. Otherwise restarts the start point input.
methods.remarks: Handles the event of hitting ESC during the input Cancels the input, when ESC is hit during the start point input. Otherwise restarts the start point input.

returns.doc: False during the start point input, True otherwise

methods.name: on_mouse_leave
methods.summary: Handles the event of mouse leaving the viewport
methods.remarks: Handles the event of mouse leaving the viewport

methods.name: process_mouse_msg
methods.signature: process_mouse_msg(mouse_msg: int, pnt: Point2D, msg_info: AddMsgInfo) -> bool
methods.summary: Handles the process mouse message event
methods.remarks: Handles the process mouse message event

params.name: pnt
params.doc: input point in Allplan view coordinates

methods.name: start_end_point_input
methods.summary: Start the input of the line's end point
methods.remarks: Start the input of the line's end point

methods.name: start_input
methods.summary: Start the input of the line's start point
methods.remarks: Start the input of the line's start point

params.name: coord_input
params.doc: API object for the coordinate input, element selection, ... in the Allplan view
